comments.body:
@rhatdan Is there something specific you want included in the release? AFAICS the c/common update is just a renaming cleanup. Is that to align versions with other components, or for some other reason?

(Also, there should be a post-release bump to 1.2.3-dev.)
Yes for the realignment, no other reason.
OK, so please add a post-release bump, and we’ll include this on both `master` and `release-1.2` branches.
This is not needed so closing.
